pages.title: Fire Emblem Fates: Hoshidan Classes - Class Skills

rows.name: Dragon Ward
rows.description: Allies adjacent to the user have a Luck x 0.5% chance of receiving half damage from enemy attacks

rows.name: Hoshidan Unity
rows.description: Adds 10% to skill activation rates

rows.name: Duelist’s Blow
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, Avoid +30

rows.name: Vantage
rows.description: At the start of battle, when the user has under half HP, they attack first

rows.name: Astra
rows.description: Skill x 0.5% chance of triggering 5 consecutive hits with half damage

rows.name: Swordfaire
rows.description: When user is equipped with a Sword, damage +5 during battle

rows.name: Seal Strength
rows.description: After battle, enemy’s Strength -6 *1

rows.name: Life and Death
rows.description: During battles, damage +10, damage received +10

rows.name: Seal Resistance
rows.description: After battle, enemy’s Resistance -6 *1

rows.name: Shove
rows.description: Select the “Shove” command to push an adjacent ally 1 tile

rows.name: Death Blow
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, Critical rate +20

rows.name: Counter
rows.description: When an adjacent enemy triggers the battle and inflicts damage, the enemy receives the same damage

rows.name: Salvage Blow
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, Luck% chance of receiving a Katana, Naginata, Club, Yumi or Shuriken if the user defeats the enemy

rows.name: Lancebreaker
rows.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Lance

rows.name: Seal Defence
rows.description: After battle, enemy’s Defence -6 *1

rows.name: Swap
rows.description: Select the “Swap” command to swap places with an adjacent ally on the map

rows.name: Seal Speed
rows.description: After battle, enemy’s Speed -6 *1

rows.name: Lancefaire
rows.description: When user is equipped with a Lance, damage +5 during battle

rows.name: Rend Heaven
rows.description: Skill x 1.5% chance of adding half the enemy’s Strength (if user has a physical weapon) or Magic (if user has a magical weapon) as damage

rows.name: Quixotic
rows.description: User and enemy’s Hit rate +30 and skill activation rate +15% during battle

rows.name: Magic +2
rows.description: Magic +2

rows.name: Future Sight
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, Luck% chance of gaining double experience when user defeats the enemy

rows.name: Rally Magic
rows.description: Magic +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rows.name: Tomefaire
rows.description: When user is equipped with a Tome, damage +5 during battle

rows.name: Miracle
rows.description: Luck% chance of leaving the user with 1 HP when they have 2 or more HP

rows.name: Rally Luck
rows.description: Luck +8 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rows.name: Renewal
rows.description: Recover 30% HP at the start of the user’s Turn

rows.name: Countermagic
rows.description: When the enemy triggers the battle and inflicts magical damage, the enemy receives the same damage

rows.name: Darting Blow
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, follow up attack speed +5

rows.name: Camaraderie
rows.description: Recover 10% HP at the start of the user’s Turn if there are allies within a 2 tile radius

rows.name: Rally Speed
rows.description: Speed +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rows.name: Warding Blow
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, magical damage received -20

rows.name: Air Superiority
rows.description: Hit rate and Avoid +30 when facing Flying enemies

rows.name: Amaterasu
rows.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius recover 20% HP at the start of the user’s Turn

rows.name: Skill +2
rows.description: Skill +2

rows.name: Quick Draw
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, damage +4

rows.name: Certain Blow
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, Hit rate +40

rows.name: Bowfaire
rows.description: When user is equipped with a Bow, damage +5 during battle

rows.name: Locktouch
rows.description: User can open doors and chests without requiring keys

rows.name: Poison Strike
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, the enemy’s HP is reduced by 20% after the battle

rows.name: Lethality
rows.description: Skill x 0.25% chance of instantly defeating the enemy when dealing 1 or more damage

rows.name: Shurikenfaire
rows.description: When user is equipped with a Dagger, damage +5 during battle

rows.name: Golembane
rows.description: Attacks are effective against Mechanists, Automatons and Stoneborn

rows.name: Replicate
rows.description: Select the “Replicate” command once per map to create a replica with the same appearance, stats, inventory and HP as the user (Anything that happens to the replica happens to the user and vice versa–even death)

rows.name: Potent Potion
rows.description: The effect of HP recovery and stat-boosting potions is increased by 50%

rows.name: Quick Salve
rows.description: After consuming a HP recovery or stat-boosting potion, the user can perform another action

rows.name: Profiteer
rows.description: Luck% chance of obtaining a Gold Bar after moving during the first seven Turns

rows.name: Spendthrift
rows.description: During battles, user spends a Gold Bar for damage +10 and damage received -10

rows.name: Evenhanded
rows.description: During even-numbered Turns, damage +4

rows.name: Beastbane
rows.description: When user is a Wolfskin or Kitsune, their attacks are effective against Beast units

rows.name: Even Better
rows.description: Recover 40% HP at the start of even-numbered Turns

rows.name: Grisly Wound
rows.description: The enemy’s HP is reduced by 20% after the battle

rows.name: Luck +4
rows.description: Luck +4

rows.name: Inspiring Song
rows.description: Skill, Speed and Luck +3 for one Turn for the unit who receives the user’s song

rows.name: Voice of Peace
rows.description: Enemies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 less physical damage

rows.name: Foreign Princess
rows.description: “Foreign Army” enemies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 less damage and receive 2 extra damage

rows.name: Aptitude
rows.description: Adds 10% to all growth rates during Level Ups

rows.name: Underdog
rows.description: Hit rate and Avoid +15 when user’s Level is lower than the enemy (promoted units count as Level +20)

pages.title: Fire Emblem Fates: Nohrian Classes - Class Skills

rows.name: Nobility
rows.description: Experience gained x 1.2

rows.name: Dragon Fang
rows.description: Skill x.0.75% chance of adding 50% of the user’s Attack Power as damage

rows.name: Draconic Hex
rows.description: After battle, enemy’s stats -4 *1

rows.name: Nohrian Trust
rows.description: User shares their support unit’s battle skills *2

rows.name: Elbow Room
rows.description: When user fights in terrain with no terrain effects, damage +3 during battles

rows.name: Shelter
rows.description: Select the “Shelter” command to make an adjacent ally the user’s support unit

rows.name: Defender
rows.description: When user is the lead unit while paired up, all stats +1

rows.name: Aegis
rows.description: Skill% chance of halving damage from Bow, Magic, Dagger, Dragonstone, Breath or Stone attacks

rows.name: Luna
rows.description: Skill% chance of ignoring half the enemy’s Defence (if user has a physical weapon) or Resistance (if user has a magical weapon)

rows.name: Armored Blow
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, physical damage received -10

rows.name: Defence +2
rows.description: Defence +2

rows.name: Natural Cover
rows.description: When user fights in terrain with terrain effects, damage received -3 during battles

rows.name: Wary Fighter
rows.description: During battles, neither the user or enemy can perform follow up attacks

rows.name: Pavise
rows.description: Skill% chance of halving damage from Sword, Lance, Axe, Beaststone, Claw or Puppet attacks

rows.name: HP +5
rows.description: Maximum HP +5

rows.name: Gamble
rows.description: Hit rate -10, Critical rate +10

rows.name: Rally Strength
rows.description: Strength +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rows.name: Axefaire
rows.description: When user is equipped with an Axe, damage +5 during battle

rows.name: Good Fortune
rows.description: Luck% chance of recovering 20% HP at the start of the user’s Turn

rows.name: Strong Riposte
rows.description: When enemy triggers the battle, damage +3

rows.name: Sol
rows.description: Skill% chance of restoring half the damage dealt to the enemy

rows.name: Axebreaker
rows.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with an Axe

rows.name: Rally Skill
rows.description: Skill +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rows.name: Shurikenbreaker
rows.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Dagger

rows.name: Locktouch
rows.description: User can open doors and chests without requiring keys

rows.name: Movement +1
rows.description: Movement +1

rows.name: Lucky Seven
rows.description: Hit rate and Avoid +20 for the first seven Turns

rows.name: Pass
rows.description: User can pass through tiles occupied by enemy units

rows.name: Strength +2
rows.description: Strength +2

rows.name: Lunge
rows.description: Select the “Lunge” command to swap places with an enemy after an attack

rows.name: Rally Defence
rows.description: Defence +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rows.name: Swordbreaker
rows.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Sword

rows.name: Savage Blow
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, enemies within a 2 tile radius have their HP reduced by 20% after the battle

rows.name: Trample
rows.description: Unless enemy is on a mount, damage +5

rows.name: Heartseeker
rows.description: When fighting adjacent to an enemy, enemy’s Avoid -20

rows.name: Malefic Aura
rows.description: Enemies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 extra damage from magical attacks

rows.name: Vengeance
rows.description: Skill x 1.5% chance of adding half the user’s (Max HP – Current HP) as damage

rows.name: Bowbreaker
rows.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Bow

rows.name: Seal Magic
rows.description: After battle, enemy’s Magic -6 *1

rows.name: Lifetaker
rows.description: When user triggers the battle, recover 50% HP after defeating the enemy

rows.name: Resistance +2
rows.description: Resistance +2

rows.name: Gentilhomme
rows.description: Female allies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 less damage during battles

rows.name: Demoiselle
rows.description: Male allies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 less damage during battles

rows.name: Rally Resistance
rows.description: Resistance +4 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rows.name: Inspiration
rows.description: Allies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 extra damage and receive 2 less damage during battles

rows.name: Live to Serve
rows.description: When healing an ally, the user recovers the same amount of HP

rows.name: Tomebreaker
rows.description: Hit rate and Avoid +50 when the enemy is equipped with a Tome

rows.name: Odd Shaped
rows.description: During odd-numbered Turns, damage +4

rows.name: Beastbane
rows.description: When user is a Wolfskin or Kitsune, their attacks are effective against Beast units

rows.name: Better Odds
rows.description: Recover 40% HP at the start of odd-numbered Turns

rows.name: Grisly Wound
rows.description: The enemy’s HP is reduced by 20% after the battle

pages.title: Fire Emblem Fates: Hoshidan Characters - Personal Skills

rows.name: Supportive
rows.effect: When user is the support unit, if the lead unit has a C Support or higher, the lead unit’s Hit Rate +10, damage +2 and damage received -2

rows.name: Devoted Partner
rows.effect: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s damage +2, damage received -2

rows.name: Evasive Partner
rows.effect: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s Avoid +15, damage received -3

rows.name: Miraculous Save
rows.effect: When user is the support unit, the lead unit has a Luck% chance of surviving a fatal attack with 1 HP

rows.name: Healing Descant
rows.effect: Allies within a 2 tile radius recover 10% HP at the start of the user’s Turn

rows.name: Vow of Friendship
rows.effect: If the Avatar is an ally, when the Avatar is under half HP, user’s damage +3 and damage received -3

rows.name: Highwayman
rows.effect: When user triggers the battle, if the enemy cannot counter-attack, enemy’s Strength and Speed -3 after the battle (stats recover by 1 each Turn)

rows.name: Peacebringer
rows.effect: Allies and enemies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 less damage

rows.name: Forager
rows.effect: When standing on Mountain, Woods, Waste or Field terrain, the user recovers 20% HP at the start of the Turn

rows.name: Fiery Blood
rows.effect: When user’s HP is not full, damage +4

rows.name: Quiet Strength
rows.effect: Allies within a 2 tile radius receive 2 less damage

rows.name: Fearsome Blow
rows.effect: When user triggers the battle and defeats an enemy, enemies adjacent to the user have their HP reduced by 20%

rows.name: Perfectionist
rows.effect: When user’s HP is at maximum, Hit rate and Avoid +15

rows.name: Pyrotechnics
rows.effect: When user triggers the battle at under half HP, the user and enemies within a 2 tile radius have their HP reduced by 20%

rows.name: Capture
rows.effect: When there is a Prison in My Castle, the user can select the “Capture” command. If a generic enemy is defeated, they will be sent to the Prison

rows.name: Rallying Cry
rows.effect: Allies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 extra damage

rows.name: Divine Retribution
rows.effect: When user doesn’t have a weapon equipped and they sustain damage from an adjacent enemy, the enemy receives half the same damage.

rows.name: Optimist
rows.effect: When user is healed by a staff, they recover 1.5 times the normal HP

rows.name: Pride
rows.effect: When user’s Level is lower than the enemy’s (promoted units count as Level +20), damage +3

rows.name: Nohr Enmity
rows.effect: When engaging a Nohr-related enemy, damage +3

rows.name: Triple Threat
rows.effect: When user is under half HP, half the damage received by Swords, Lances or Axes is also dealt to the enemy

rows.name: Competitive
rows.effect: When user is the lead unit and their Level is lower than their support unit’s Level, Critical rate +10, damage +3 and damage received -1

rows.name: Shuriken Mastery
rows.effect: When user receives damage from a Dagger attack, the enemy receives half the same damage and the Dagger’s stat reduction effect

rows.name: Morbid Celebration
rows.effect: When user triggers the battle, recover 20% HP after defeating the enemy

rows.name: Reciprocity
rows.effect: When a unit uses a healing staff on the user, that unit has their HP recovered by half the same amount

rows.name: Bushido
rows.effect: When user is the lead unit, if their Level is higher than their support unit’s Level, Critical rate +10, damage +2 and damage received -2

rows.name: In Extremis
rows.effect: When user’s HP is under a quarter, Critical rate +30

rows.name: Perspicacious
rows.effect: Hit rate +5 for all allies

rows.name: Draconic Heir
rows.effect: When user is equipped with a Dragonstone, they recover 15% HP at the start of their Turn

rows.name: Born Steward
rows.effect: When fighting in My Castle, Hit rate and Avoid +20, damage +2 and damage received -2

rows.name: Perfect Pitch
rows.effect: Allies within a 2 tile radius who have lower HP than the user recover 10% HP when the “Rally” command is used

rows.name: Mischievous
rows.effect: When user triggers the battle and their attack connects with the enemy, enemy’s Defence -3 and enemy is stripped

rows.name: Lucky Charm
rows.effect: Skills with an activation rate dependent on the Luck stat have their rate increased by 20%

rows.name: Noble Cause
rows.effect: When user is the lead unit, if their support unit doesn’t have full HP, damage +3 and damage received +1

rows.name: Optimistic
rows.effect: After choosing to Wait, Speed +4 and Luck +8 for one Turn

rows.name: Sweet Tooth
rows.effect: After choosing to Wait, user recovers 4 HP by eating hidden treats

rows.name: Playthings
rows.effect: After the start of the user’s Turn, all enemies that are adjacent to the user have their HP reduced by 5

rows.name: Calm
rows.effect: After choosing to Wait, Skill and Resistance +4 for one Turn

rows.name: Haiku
rows.effect: At the start of the Turn, when two allies are directly above and below Mitama, Mitama recovers 7 HP, while the the two allies recover 5 HP

rows.name: Prodigy
rows.effect: At the start of the battle, if the enemy’s Strength or Magic (whichever is highest) is higher than Caeldori’s corresponding stat, damage +4

rows.name: Vendetta
rows.effect: When user triggers the battle, if they’ve already fought the enemy in the same map, damage +4

pages.title: Fire Emblem Fates: Nohrian Characters - Personal Skills

rows.name: Supportive
rows.effect: When user is the support unit, if the lead unit has a C Support or higher, the lead unit’s Hit Rate +10, damage +2 and damage received -2

rows.name: Devoted Partner
rows.effect: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s damage +2, damage received -2

rows.name: Evasive Partner
rows.effect: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s Avoid +15, damage received -3

rows.name: Miraculous Save
rows.effect: When user is the support unit, the lead unit has a Luck% chance of surviving a fatal attack with 1 HP

rows.name: Healing Descant
rows.effect: Allies within a 2 tile radius recover 10% HP at the start of the user’s Turn

rows.name: Vow of Friendship
rows.effect: If the Avatar is an ally, when the Avatar is under half HP, user’s damage +3 and damage received -3

rows.name: Highwayman
rows.effect: When user triggers the battle, if the enemy cannot counter-attack, enemy’s Strength and Speed -3 after the battle (stats recover by 1 each Turn)

rows.name: Peacebringer
rows.effect: Allies and enemies within a 2 tile radius deal 2 less damage

rows.name: Forager
rows.effect: When standing on Mountain, Woods, Waste or Field terrain, the user recovers 20% HP at the start of the Turn

rows.name: Forceful Partner
rows.effect: If the Avatar is the lead unit, Avatar’s Hit rate +15, damage +3

rows.name: Lily’s Poise
rows.effect: Adjacent allies deal 1 extra damage and received 3 less damage

rows.name: Misfortunate
rows.effect: Enemies within a 2 tile radius have their Critical Evade reduced by 15, while the user’s Critical Evade is reduced by 5

rows.name: Puissance
rows.effect: When user’s Strength is 5 or more points higher than the enemy’s Strength, damage +3 during battle

rows.name: Aching Blood
rows.effect: When equipped with a forged weapon whose name is at least 12 characters, Critical rate +10

rows.name: Kidnap
rows.effect: When there is a Prison in My Castle, the user can select the “Capture” command. If a generic enemy is defeated, they will be sent to the Prison

rows.name: Countercurse
rows.effect: When enemy triggers the battle and inflicts magical damage, the enemy receives half the same damage

rows.name: Rose’s Thorn
rows.effect: Adjacent allies deal 3 extra damage and receive 1 less damage

rows.name: Fierce Rival
rows.effect: When user is the support unit, if the lead unit triggers a critical hit, the user is guaranteed a critical hit (if their attack connects)

rows.name: Opportunist
rows.effect: When user triggers the battle, if the enemy cannot counter-attack, damage +4

rows.name: Fancy Footwork
rows.effect: Strength and Speed +1 to all allies within a 2 tile radius for one Turn when the “Rally” command is used

rows.name: Bloodthirst
rows.effect: When user triggers the battle and defeats the enemy, Strength, Magic, Skill and Speed +4 for one turn

rows.name: Fierce Mien
rows.effect: Enemies within a 2 tile radius have their Avoid reduced by 10

rows.name: Unmask
rows.effect: When engaging a female enemy, Damage +4 and Critical rate +20

rows.name: Pragmatic
rows.effect: When enemy’s HP is not full, damage +3 and damage received -1 during the battle

rows.name: Collector
rows.effect: Luck% chance of obtaining 3 Minerals or Foodstuffs after moving up to the 7th Turn

rows.name: Chivalry
rows.effect: When enemy’s HP is at maximum, damage +2 and damage received -2 during the battle

rows.name: Icy Blood
rows.effect: When user’s HP is not full and they sustain damage, the enemy receives the same damage and the enemy’s Skill and Speed is reduced by 3

rows.name: Draconic Heir
rows.effect: When user is equipped with a Dragonstone, they recover 15% HP at the start of their Turn

rows.name: Born Steward
rows.effect: When fighting in My Castle, Hit rate and Avoid +20, damage +2 and damage received -2

rows.name: Perfect Pitch
rows.effect: Allies within a 2 tile radius who have lower HP than the user recover 10% HP when the “Rally” command is used

rows.name: Mischievous
rows.effect: When user triggers the battle and their attack connects with the enemy, enemy’s Defence -3 and enemy is stripped

rows.name: Lucky Charm
rows.effect: Skills with an activation rate dependent on the Luck stat have their rate increased by 20%

rows.name: Gallant
rows.effect: When user is the support unit, if the lead unit is female, the lead unit’s damage +2

rows.name: Fierce Counter
rows.effect: When a male enemy triggers the battle, damage +2

rows.name: Guarded Bravery
rows.effect: When user is the lead unit, damage received -2. If no support unit available, damage received +2

rows.name: Goody Basket
rows.effect: At the start of the Turn, Luck% chance of recovering 10% HP

rows.name: Fortunate Son
rows.effect: Allies within a 2 tile radius have their Critical Evade increased by 15, while the user’s Critical Evade is increased by 5

rows.name: Bibliophile
rows.effect: When user is carrying 3 or more Tomes, Critical rate +10

rows.name: Sisterhood
rows.effect: When user is the lead unit, if their support unit is female, damage +2 and damage received -2

rows.name: Daydream
rows.effect: When user is adjacent to two male units paired up, damage +2 and damage received -2

pages.title: Fire Emblem Fates: Other Characters - Personal Skills

rows.name: Wind Disciple
rows.effect: When user’s HP is not full, Hit rate and Avoid +10

rows.name: Make a Killing
rows.effect: Luck% chance of obtaining Gold after defeating an enemy
